legacy.description: CPU: CLIP-MLP aesthetic + SAMP-Net composition + CLIP tagging + TOPIQ IAA/NR-Face/LIQE + BiRefNet saliency (8GB+ RAM; saliency/IQA are slower on CPU)

8gb.description: CLIP-MLP aesthetic + SAMP-Net composition + CLIP tagging + TOPIQ IAA/NR-Face/LIQE + BiRefNet saliency (6-14GB VRAM)

16gb.description: TOPIQ aesthetic + SigLIP 2 embeddings + Qwen3.5-2B tagging (~14GB VRAM)

24gb.description: TOPIQ aesthetic + SigLIP 2 embeddings + Qwen3.5-4B tagging (~18GB VRAM)

saliency.description: BiRefNet-dynamic subject saliency detection, multi-resolution (~2 GB VRAM)
